records.label: T1.1  Z_3 / S^2 orbifold c_1 takes values in {0, 1/3, 2/3, 1, 4/3} (i.e. in (1/3).Z)
T1.2  2/9 is NOT in (1/3).Z (denominator mismatch with single Z_3 quotient)
records.detail: Z_3 single-orbifold Chern denominator is 3, not 9.

records.label: T1.3  T^2 / Z_3 orbifold c_1 also in (1/3).Z (3 fixed points, ABSS)
records.detail: Standard Kawasaki orbifold index: any single Z_p quotient gives (1/p).Z denominator.

records.label: T1.4  Single Z_3 quotient cannot host 2/9 as orbifold Chern
records.detail: Need cover order 9, not 3, to obtain denominator 9.

records.label: T1.5  ABSS eta(Z_3, weights (1,2)) = 2/9 — this IS in (1/9).Z but is a mod-Z fractional invariant
records.detail: eta_ABSS = 2/9; this is the *spectral* invariant 'eta', not a literal radian.

records.label: T1.6  Radian PHASE from ABSS eta = 2 pi * (2/9) = 4 pi / 9 (rational * pi, NOT 2/9 rad)
records.detail: phase = 4*pi/9; differs from 2/9 by factor of 2 pi.

records.label: T1.7  Orbifold c_1 enters phases as exp(2 pi i c_1), giving rational * pi
records.detail: Phase = 2 pi * (orbifold Chern). Cannot strip the 2 pi without un-natural pi-stripping.

records.label: T2.1  Pure Z_3 character bundle on 3x3 discrete BZ has discrete Chern integer = 0
records.detail: discrete Chern = 0.000000000000

records.label: T2.2.1  Discrete-FHS uniform-flux Chern (flux = 2 pi n/L^2 per plaq, total = 2 pi n) = 1
records.detail: discrete Chern = 1.000000

records.label: T2.2.2  Discrete-FHS uniform-flux Chern (flux = 2 pi n/L^2 per plaq, total = 2 pi n) = 2
records.detail: discrete Chern = 2.000000

records.label: T2.2.3  Discrete-FHS uniform-flux Chern (flux = 2 pi n/L^2 per plaq, total = 2 pi n) = 3
records.detail: discrete Chern = 3.000000

records.label: T2.3  Z_3-equivariant discrete TKNN on closed Z^2/Z^3 BZ remains INTEGER-valued
records.detail: Equivariance reduces moduli space; closed BZ gives integer Chern by FHS theorem.

records.label: T2.4  Orbifold Chern on Z^3 / Z_3 with isolated Z_3 fixed points lives in (1/3).Z, not (1/9).Z
records.detail: Single Z_3 stabilizer denominators are 3.

records.label: T2.5  Discrete TKNN on the framework's lattice cannot directly give 2/9
records.detail: Either integer (closed BZ) or in (1/3).Z (Z_3 orbifold contribution).

records.label: T3.1  Band-resolved discrete Chern of circulant Y on twist-torus T^2 is integer (band 0)
records.detail: band 0 Chern = -0.000000

records.label: T3.2  Generic (a,b) gives band 0 Chern = 0 (no nontrivial twist Berry phase on flat C_3 family)
records.detail: band 0 Chern = -0.000000 (rounds to 0)

records.label: T3.3  Y has 3 non-degenerate eigenvalues generically (q-fold degeneracy q = 1)
records.detail: NTW fractional p/q requires q-fold degenerate ground state; here q = 1.

records.label: T3.4  Twisted-boundary Chern p/q with q | 3 cannot give 2/9 (denominator 9)
records.detail: Z_3 ground-state degeneracy is at most 3; gives p/q with q | 3; 2/9 has q=9 -> mismatch.

records.label: T4.1  Z_3 x Z_3 orbifold c_1 takes values in {0, 1/9, ..., 8/9, 1} = (1/9).Z
T4.2  Framework retains ONE Z_3 (generation cyclic), not two independent Z_3 factors
records.detail: C_3 acting on V_3 induces C_3 on End(V_3) by conjugation, not a Z_3 x Z_3.

records.label: T4.3  Z_3-center-of-SU(3) acts trivially on charged leptons (color singlets)
records.detail: Leptons are color singlets; Z_3 center of SU(3) acts trivially.

records.label: T4.4  APBC time circle gives Matsubara Z_{2 L_t}, not a Z_3 factor
records.detail: Matsubara phases (2n+1)pi/L_t are integer/2L_t multiples of pi.

records.label: T4.5  Spin/SO double cover is Z_2, not Z_3; no natural Z_3 x Z_3 doubling
records.detail: Cl(3) -> SO(3) double cover is Z_2.

records.label: T4.6  Even with hypothetical Z_3xZ_3, orbifold c_1 = 2/9 yields phase 4 pi / 9 (rational * pi)
records.detail: Orbifold Chern enters phase via exp(2 pi i c_1); 2 pi factor unavoidable.

records.label: T5.1  R(Z_3) = Z[xi] / (xi^3 - 1), rank 3 over Z
records.detail: Basis: chi_0 = 1, chi_1 = xi, chi_2 = xi^2.

records.label: T5.2  [V_3] = chi_0 + chi_1 + chi_2 (regular rep)
records.detail: Standard.

records.label: T5.3  Equivariant ch([V]) lands in Z[1/|Z_3|] = Z[1/3], not Z[1/9]
records.detail: Single Z_3 quotient: localization at Z_3 fixed points gives Z[1/3] coefficients.

records.label: T5.4.01  ch_zeta^1([chi_0]) has Re = {1, -1/2}; never in 2/9-bearing set
records.detail: Re(zeta^0) = 1

records.label: T5.4.02  ch_zeta^2([chi_0]) has Re = {1, -1/2}; never in 2/9-bearing set
records.detail: Re(zeta^0) = 1

records.label: T5.4.11  ch_zeta^1([chi_1]) has Re = {1, -1/2}; never in 2/9-bearing set
records.detail: Re(zeta^1) = -1/2

records.label: T5.4.12  ch_zeta^2([chi_1]) has Re = {1, -1/2}; never in 2/9-bearing set
records.detail: Re(zeta^2) = -1/2

records.label: T5.4.21  ch_zeta^1([chi_2]) has Re = {1, -1/2}; never in 2/9-bearing set
records.detail: Re(zeta^2) = -1/2

records.label: T5.4.22  ch_zeta^2([chi_2]) has Re = {1, -1/2}; never in 2/9-bearing set
records.detail: Re(zeta^4) = -1/2

records.label: T5.5  ABSS eta = 2/9 is in (1/9).Z but is a SPECTRAL fractional invariant (mod-Z), not a ch class
records.detail: Eta is the boundary correction, not the bulk Chern character.

records.label: T5.6  Physical phase from ch = 2/9 is exp(2 pi i * 2/9), yielding angle 4 pi / 9 (rational * pi)
records.detail: Cannot strip the 2 pi factor from a Chern-class-derived radian.

records.label: T6.1.1  Physical Koide base K_norm^+ / C_3 = open interval (Theorem 1, R2)
records.detail: From KOIDE_BERRY_BUNDLE_OBSTRUCTION_THEOREM_NOTE_2026-04-19.md.

records.label: T6.1.2  Orbifold-equivariant line bundles on contractible base are trivial
records.detail: Open interval is contractible; all complex (and orbifold) line bundles trivial.

records.label: T6.1.3  Orbifold c_1 = 0 on the physical Koide base, regardless of (1/9).Z structure on auxiliary spaces
records.detail: R2 extends: Berry-bundle obstruction kills orbifold Chern on the actual physical base.

records.label: T6.2.1  Orbifold Chern 2/9 enters phase as exp(2 pi i * 2/9) = exp(4 pi i / 9)
records.detail: Phase angle = 4*pi/9 = 4 pi / 9 (rational * pi).

records.label: T6.2.2  Phase 4 pi / 9 != 2/9 rad (Lindemann: rational * pi cap pure rational = {0})
records.detail: 4 pi / 9 ~ 1.396 rad; 2/9 rad = 0.222.  Different by factor 2 pi.

records.label: T6.3.1  Yukawa amplitude phase delta = arg(b) is a continuous spectral modulus on (a, b1, b2)
records.detail: delta sweeps the (b1, b2)-half-plane; no Chern-index can equal it generically.

records.label: T6.3.2  Discrete topological invariants cannot pin a continuous modulus (equivariant index no-go)
records.detail: From KOIDE_EQUIVARIANT_INDEX_NO_GO_NOTE_2026-04-24.md.

records.label: T6.4  Orbifold/discrete Chern does not close postulate P (radian-bridge identification)
records.detail: Four converging obstructions: R2 triviality, single-Z_3 (1/3).Z mismatch, 2 pi prefactor, continuous modulus.

records.label: T7.F1  R2 (Berry-bundle obstruction) extends to orbifold Chern on physical base
records.detail: Contractible base => trivial bundle => orbifold c_1 = 0.

records.label: T7.F2  Equivariant Chern in R(G) is integer; fractional values are eta-type spectral invariants
records.detail: Bulk K-theory: integer; fractional only via boundary / orbifold corrections.

records.label: T7.F3  All Chern phases are 2 pi * (rational) = rational * pi (Type A in lattice-quantization-set)
records.detail: Every Chern-derived radian is rational * pi by construction.

records.label: T7.F4  Chern indices bundles, not phase parameters; bundle-vs-phase mismatch
records.detail: Yukawa phase delta = arg(b) is a continuous modulus, not a discrete index.

records.label: T7.F5  Framework retains one Z_3, not Z_3 x Z_3; (1/9).Z denominator unavailable
records.detail: Single C_3 cyclic; no second independent Z_3 in retained structure.

records.label: T7.G  ABSS eta = 2/9 is genuinely (1/9).Z but is Type B (combinatorial) not Type A (radian)
records.detail: Single Z_3 + (zeta-1)(zeta^2-1) = 3 algebraic identity gives denominator 9 in eta, but no radian unit.

records.label: T8.1  TKNN base is closed T^2; framework base is open interval (R2)
records.detail: TKNN: closed manifold supports nontrivial bundle topology. Framework: contractible.

records.label: T8.2  TKNN Chern is integer; orbifold extensions give (1/p).Z; 2/9 needs (1/9).Z denominator
records.detail: Single Z_3 orbifold gives (1/3).Z, not (1/9).Z. Need additional structure (e.g. ABSS / Z_3 x Z_3).

records.label: T8.3  TKNN target = quantized conductance; framework target = continuous Yukawa-phase modulus
records.detail: Discrete observable vs continuous modulus — fundamental type difference.

records.label: T8.4  TKNN: 2 pi absorbed in unit (h vs hbar); framework: 2 pi unabsorbed in retained structure
records.detail: Cl(3)/Z^3 + APBC has no canonical 'h' that absorbs 2 pi; phases stay as rational * pi.

records.label: T8.5  Orbifold-TKNN analog cannot produce literal 2/9 rad without postulate P
records.detail: Type-A (Chern phase) and Type-B (orbifold rational) coincide numerically only if P is added.

constructions_tested: T1: Z_3 orbifold of S^2 / T^2 (single quotient)
T2: Discrete TKNN on Z^3 with Z_3 equivariance (FHS plaquette)
T3: Niu-Thouless-Wu twisted boundary Chern on V_3
T4: Z_3 x Z_3 doubled orbifold (|G|^2 = 9 lift)
T5: Z_3-equivariant K-theory R(Z_3) and Chern character
T6: Application to Yukawa amplitude phase delta = arg(b)
obstructions_named: F1: R2 Berry-bundle obstruction extends to orbifold Chern (open-interval base)
F2: Bulk equivariant Chern is integer; fractional only via eta/boundary
F3: All Chern phases are 2 pi * rational = rational * pi
F4: Chern indices bundles, not Yukawa phase parameters
F5: Single Z_3 vs Z_3 x Z_3 — framework retains one, not two
strongest_2_over_9_coincidence: ABSS eta(Z_3, weights (1,2)) = 2/9 mod Z (single Z_3)
physical_phase_from_strongest: exp(2 pi i * 2/9) = exp(4 pi i / 9) — rational * pi, not 2/9 rad
